summary: Added SELF_MODEL.json staleness audit. The audit checks generated index freshness without requiring stored repo_head to equal current HEAD, because the commit storing the generated index necessarily advances HEAD. It detects CAP/GAP/VERIFY source-record drift since stored repo_head and compares the stored index to a normalized rebuild while ignoring generated_at and repo_head. Added scripts/audit_self_model_index.py and expanded self-model tests. Focused self-model tests passed with 18 tests and the full suite passed with 287 tests before commit.
